name: @blackbelt-technology/pi-dashboard-authoring-toolkit
description_en: General-purpose authoring skills for pi sessions — skill-creator (author/update skills) and session-to-guideline (turn a pi session JSONL transcript into a how-we-did-it Markdown playbook). Pure-skill package, no extension.ts. skill-creator adapted from A
description_zh: pi 会话的通用创作技能 — skill-creator（创作/更新技能）和 session-to-guideline（将 pi 会话 JSONL 转录为 how-we-did-it Markdown 操作手册）。纯技能包，无 extension.ts。skill-creator 改编自 A
